337	rbho_retriever() {
338	  buc_doc_brief "Retriever walkthrough — pull and run vessel images"
339	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
340	
341	  local -r z_docs="${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}"
342	
343	  # --- Extract config and probe ---
344	  local z_secrets_dir=""
345	  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
346	    z_secrets_dir=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_SECRETS_DIR") || z_secrets_dir=""
347	  fi
348	
349	  local z_ru1 z_ru2 z_ru3 z_ru4
350	  zrbho_probe_retriever_units
351	
352	  # --- Count progress ---
353	  local z_done=0
354	  if test "${z_ru1}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
355	  if test "${z_ru2}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
356	  if test "${z_ru3}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
357	  if test "${z_ru4}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
358	  local -r z_total=4
359	
360	  # --- Header ---
361	  buh_section "Retriever Walkthrough"
362	  buh_e
363	
364	  if test "${z_done}" = "${z_total}"; then
365	    # ============ REFERENCE MODE — all probes green ============
366	    buh_t  "  All steps complete. Re-run anytime to verify health."
367	    buh_e
368	    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Credential gate — SA key installed"
369	    zrbho_po_status 1 "  First artifact — hallmark summoned locally"
370	    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Container runtime — crucible charged"
371	    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Local experimentation — kludge image present"
372	  else
373	    # ============ WALKTHROUGH MODE — show frontier unit ============
374	    local -r z_frontier=$((z_done + 1))
375	    buh_t  "  Step ${z_frontier} of ${z_total}"
376	    buh_e
377	
378	    if test "${z_ru1}" = "0"; then
379	      # ---- Unit 1: Credential Gate ----
380	      buh_section "  Credential Gate"
381	      buh_e
382	      buh_tlt "  A " "depot" "${z_docs}#Depot" " is the facility where container images are built and stored."
383	      buh_tlt "  A " "retriever" "${z_docs}#Retriever" " is a role with read access to a depot — you pull and run"
384	      buh_t   "  container images that others have built."
385	      buh_e
386	      buh_t   "  To access a depot, you need a service account key. Your governor creates"
387	      buh_t   "  one by running:"
388	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_CHARTER_RETRIEVER}"
389	      buh_e
390	      if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}"; then
391	        buh_t   "  Install the key file to:"
392	        buh_tc  "    " "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_retriever}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"
393	      else
394	        buh_tW  "  " "Project not configured — .rbk/rbrr.env not found."
395	        buh_t   "  Run the payor walkthrough first, or ask your payor for the project files."
396	      fi
397	      buh_e
398	      buh_t   "  Once installed, re-run this walkthrough to continue."
399	
400	    elif test "${z_ru2}" = "0"; then
401	      # ---- Unit 2: First Artifact ----
402	      buh_section "  First Artifact"
403	      buh_e
404	      buh_tlt "  A " "vessel" "${z_docs}#Vessel" " is a specification for a container image."
405	      buh_tlt "  A " "hallmark" "${z_docs}#Hallmark" " is a specific build instance of a vessel, identified by"
406	      buh_t   "  timestamp."
407	      buh_e
408	      buh_tlt "  " "Summon" "${z_docs}#Summon" " pulls a hallmark image from the depot to your local machine:"
409	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_SUMMON_HALLMARK}"
410	      buh_e
411	      buh_tlt "  If something fails, check the " "Log" "${z_docs}#Log" " — the file paths are printed at the"
412	      buh_t   "  top of the command output."
413	      buh_e
414	      buh_t   "  After summoning, inspect the artifact's provenance:"
415	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_PLUMB_FULL}"
416	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_PLUMB_COMPACT}"
417	      buh_e
418	      buh_tlt "  A " "vouch" "${z_docs}#Vouch" " is cryptographic attestation proving the artifact was built"
419	      buh_t   "  by trusted infrastructure."
420	      buh_tlt "  " "Plumb" "${z_docs}#Plumb" " lets you inspect the SBOM, build info, and vouch chain —"
421	      buh_t   "  this is how you know what you're running."
422	
423	    elif test "${z_ru3}" = "0"; then
424	      # ---- Unit 3: Container Runtime ----
425	      buh_section "  Container Runtime"
426	      buh_e
427	      buh_tlt "  A " "bottle" "${z_docs}#Bottle" " is your workload container, running unmodified in a controlled"
428	      buh_t   "  network environment."
429	      buh_tlt "  A " "nameplate" "${z_docs}#Nameplate" " ties a sentry and bottle together into a runnable unit."
430	      buh_e
431	      buh_tlt "  The " "sentry" "${z_docs}#Sentry" " enforces network policies via iptables and dnsmasq."
432	      buh_tlt "  The " "pentacle" "${z_docs}#Pentacle" " establishes the network namespace shared with the bottle."
433	      buh_e
434	      buh_tlt "  " "Charge" "${z_docs}#Charge" " starts the sentry/pentacle/bottle triad:"
435	      buh_tI  "    " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_CHARGE}" "${RBCC_onboarding_nameplate}"
436	      buh_e
437	      buh_t   "  Shell into the bottle and look around:"
438	      buh_tTc "    " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_RACK}" " ${RBCC_onboarding_nameplate}"
439	      buh_e
440	      buh_tlt "  When done, " "quench" "${z_docs}#Quench" " stops and cleans up:"
441	      buh_tI  "    " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_QUENCH}" "${RBCC_onboarding_nameplate}"
442	
443	    else
444	      # ---- Unit 4: Local Experimentation ----
445	      buh_section "  Local Experimentation"
446	      buh_e
447	      buh_tlt "  " "Kludge" "${z_docs}#Kludge" " builds a vessel image locally for fast iteration — no registry"
448	      buh_t   "  push, no director credentials needed:"
449	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_KLUDGE_VESSEL}"
450	      buh_e
451	      buh_t   "  After kludging, charge a nameplate to test your local build, then rack in"
452	      buh_t   "  and look around. Kludge is the retriever's experimentation tool — iterate"
453	      buh_t   "  on your local environment without Cloud Build."
454	    fi
455	  fi
456	
457	  buh_e
458	  buh_tT "  Triage: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_TRIAGE}"
459	
460	}

462	rbho_director() {
463	  buc_doc_brief "Director walkthrough — build and publish vessel images"
464	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
465	
466	  local -r z_docs="${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}"
467	
468	  # --- Extract config and probe ---
469	  local z_secrets_dir=""
470	  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
471	    z_secrets_dir=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_SECRETS_DIR") || z_secrets_dir=""
472	  fi
473	
474	  local z_du1=0
475	  local z_du2=0
476	  local z_du3=0
477	  local z_du4=0
478	  local z_du5=0
479	  local z_du6=0
480	  local z_du7=0
481	  zrbho_probe_director_units
482	
483	  # --- Count progress ---
484	  local z_done=0
485	  if test "${z_du1}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
486	  if test "${z_du2}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
487	  if test "${z_du3}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
488	  if test "${z_du4}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
489	  if test "${z_du5}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
490	  if test "${z_du6}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
491	  if test "${z_du7}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
492	  local -r z_total=7
493	
494	  # --- Header ---
495	  buh_section "Director Walkthrough"
496	  buh_e
497	
498	  if test "${z_done}" = "${z_total}"; then
499	    # ============ REFERENCE MODE — all probes green ============
500	    buh_t  "  All steps complete. Re-run anytime to verify health."
501	    buh_e
502	    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Credential gate — director SA key installed"
503	    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Local build — kludge image present"
504	    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Depot foundation — base images enshrined"
505	    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Conjure — production build image present"
506	    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Bind — pinned upstream image present"
507	    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Graft — locally-built image pushed"
508	    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Full ark — all three modes compared"
509	  else
510	    # ============ WALKTHROUGH MODE — show frontier unit ============
511	    local -r z_frontier=$((z_done + 1))
512	    buh_t  "  Step ${z_frontier} of ${z_total}"
513	    buh_e
514	
515	    if test "${z_du1}" = "0"; then
516	      # ---- Unit 1: Credential Gate ----
517	      buh_section "  Credential Gate"
518	      buh_e
519	      buh_tlt "  A " "depot" "${z_docs}#Depot" " is the facility where container images are built and stored."
520	      buh_tlt "  A " "director" "${z_docs}#Director" " is a role with build and publish access to a depot —"
521	      buh_t   "  you create container images and push them to the registry."
522	      buh_e
523	      buh_t   "  Where a retriever can only pull, a director can build, push, and manage"
524	      buh_t   "  artifacts. Your governor knighted this service account for build operations."
525	      buh_e
526	      buh_t   "  To access a depot, you need a service account key. Your governor creates"
527	      buh_t   "  one by running:"
528	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_KNIGHT_DIRECTOR}"
529	      buh_e
530	      if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}"; then
531	        buh_t   "  Install the key file to:"
532	        buh_tc  "    " "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_director}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"
533	      else
534	        buh_tW  "  " "Project not configured — .rbk/rbrr.env not found."
535	        buh_t   "  Run the payor walkthrough first, or ask your payor for the project files."
536	      fi
537	      buh_e
538	      buh_t   "  Once installed, re-run this walkthrough to continue."
539	
540	    elif test "${z_du2}" = "0"; then
541	      # ---- Unit 2: Kludge — Local Build ----
542	      buh_section "  Kludge: Local Build"
543	      buh_e
544	      buh_tlt "  A " "vessel" "${z_docs}#Vessel" " is a specification for a container image — a Dockerfile,"
545	      buh_t   "  build context, and metadata defining what gets built."
546	      buh_e
547	      buh_tlt "  " "Kludge" "${z_docs}#Kludge" " builds a vessel image locally using Docker — no Cloud Build"
548	      buh_t   "  setup needed, no registry push. The fastest way to see a vessel come to life."
549	      buh_e
550	      buh_t   "  Build the sentry vessel locally:"
551	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_KLUDGE_VESSEL}"
552	      buh_e
553	      buh_tlt "  After kludging, test by " "charging" "${z_docs}#Charge" " a crucible and shelling in:"
554	      buh_tI  "    " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_CHARGE}" "${RBCC_onboarding_nameplate}"
555	      buh_tTc "    " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_RACK}" " ${RBCC_onboarding_nameplate}"
556	      buh_e
557	      buh_t   "  Later units teach how to build this same vessel via Cloud Build for production,"
558	      buh_t   "  and how to push your local build to the registry."
559	
560	    elif test "${z_du3}" = "0"; then
561	      # ---- Unit 3: Depot Foundation — Reliquary and Enshrine ----
562	      buh_section "  Depot Foundation: Reliquary and Enshrine"
563	      buh_e
564	      buh_t   "  Before Cloud Build can create production images, the depot needs two kinds"
565	      buh_t   "  of upstream images mirrored into your registry:"
566	      buh_e
567	      buh_tlt "  An " "ark" "${z_docs}#Ark" " is an immutable container image artifact in the registry,"
568	      buh_t   "  produced from a vessel."
569	      buh_e
570	      buh_t   "  Tool images (reliquary): gcloud, docker, syft, skopeo, binfmt — the"
571	      buh_t   "  tools that Cloud Build steps consume during a build."
572	      buh_e
573	      buh_tlt "  Base images (" "enshrine" "${z_docs}#Enshrine" "): the upstream images that vessels build FROM."
574	      buh_t   "  Mirrored into your depot's registry with content-addressed anchors."
575	      buh_e
576	      buh_t   "  Mirror tool images into the depot:"
577	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_INSCRIBE_RELIQUARY}"
578	      buh_e
579	      buh_t   "  Enshrine base images for the sentry vessel:"
580	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_ENSHRINE_VESSEL}"
581	      buh_e
582	      buh_tlt "  Both are multi-step orchestrations. The " "Transcript" "${z_docs}#Transcript" " captures each"
583	      buh_tlt "  decision point; the " "Log" "${z_docs}#Log" " captures full output. Check them if a step fails."
584	      buh_e
585	      buh_t   "  Reliquary provides the tools; enshrine provides the foundations."
586	      buh_tltlt "  Both must be in place before " "conjure" "${z_docs}#Conjure" " or " "bind" "${z_docs}#Bind" "."
587	      buh_e
588	      buh_t   "  After completing both, proceed to conjure your first production build."
589	      buh_tlt "  The probe for this step turns green when a conjure " "hallmark" "${z_docs}#Hallmark" ""
590	      buh_tlt "  is " "summoned" "${z_docs}#Summon" " locally (next step)."
591	
592	    elif test "${z_du4}" = "0"; then
593	      # ---- Unit 4: Conjure — Production Build ----
594	      # (Frontier only if du3 green but du4 red — rare due to shared probe,
595	      #  but shown in reference mode as separate unit)
596	      buh_section "  Conjure: Production Build"
597	      buh_e
598	      buh_tlt "  A " "hallmark" "${z_docs}#Hallmark" " is a specific build instance of a vessel, identified by"
599	      buh_t   "  timestamp."
600	      buh_e
601	      buh_tlt "  " "Ordain" "${z_docs}#Ordain" " creates a hallmark with full attestation — the production build"
602	      buh_t   "  command."
603	      buh_tlt "  " "Conjure" "${z_docs}#Conjure" " is the ordain mode where Cloud Build creates the image from"
604	      buh_t   "  source. Every conjure produces a three-part ark: image, about (SBOM + build"
605	      buh_t   "  info), and vouch (DSSE signature verification)."
606	      buh_e
607	      buh_t   "  This is the same vessel you kludged locally — now Cloud Build creates it"
608	      buh_tlt "  with full SLSA provenance. The " "Transcript" "${z_docs}#Transcript" " tracks build submission,"
609	      buh_t   "  polling, and attestation steps:"
610	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK}"
611	      buh_e
612	      buh_tlt "  Verify with " "vouch" "${z_docs}#Vouch" " (cryptographic attestation) and"
613	      buh_tlt "  " "tally" "${z_docs}#Tally" " (registry inventory):"
614	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_VOUCH_HALLMARKS}"
615	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_TALLY_HALLMARKS}"
616	      buh_e
617	      buh_tlt "  Then " "summon" "${z_docs}#Summon" " the hallmark locally to confirm the full pipeline:"
618	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_SUMMON_HALLMARK}"
619	
620	    elif test "${z_du5}" = "0"; then
621	      # ---- Unit 5: Bind — Pin Upstream Image ----
622	      buh_section "  Bind: Pin Upstream Image"
623	      buh_e
624	      buh_tlt "  " "Bind" "${z_docs}#Bind" " mirrors a pinned upstream image into your depot. No Dockerfile,"
625	      buh_t   "  no build — just a content-addressed copy."
626	      buh_e
627	      buh_t   "  PlantUML is useful for rendering architecture diagrams, but its Docker Hub"
628	      buh_tlt "  image could send your private diagrams anywhere. Bind pins it by " "digest" "${z_docs}#Bind" " —"
629	      buh_tlt "  no silent updates. Then " "charge" "${z_docs}#Charge" " it as a bottle: the sentry blocks"
630	      buh_t   "  all egress. You get the tool without the risk."
631	      buh_e
632	      buh_t   "  Ordain the plantuml vessel in bind mode:"
633	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK}"
634	      buh_e
635	      buh_t   "  The upstream image is pulled by digest, pushed to GAR, about metadata"
636	      buh_tlt "  generated, and " "vouch" "${z_docs}#Vouch" " records a digest-pin verdict. No SLSA provenance —"
637	      buh_t   "  the image was not built here, but it is pinned and bottled."
638	      buh_e
639	      buh_tlt "  Verify and " "summon" "${z_docs}#Summon" ":"
640	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_VOUCH_HALLMARKS}"
641	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_SUMMON_HALLMARK}"
642	
643	    elif test "${z_du6}" = "0"; then
644	      # ---- Unit 6: Graft — Push Local to Registry ----
645	      buh_section "  Graft: Push Local to Registry"
646	      buh_e
647	      buh_tlt "  " "Graft" "${z_docs}#Graft" " pushes a locally-built image to GAR. The image push is local"
648	      buh_t   "  (docker push), but about and vouch still run in Cloud Build."
649	      buh_e
650	      buh_t   "  You kludged the sentry in step 2 and conjured it in step 4. Now push your"
651	      buh_t   "  local build to the registry via graft:"
652	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK}"
653	      buh_e
654	      buh_t   "  One combined Cloud Build job runs about + vouch. The vouch verdict is"
655	      buh_t   "  GRAFTED — meaning this image was locally built, trust it at your own"
656	      buh_t   "  assessment."
657	      buh_e
658	      buh_t   "  The development cycle: kludge, test, graft when satisfied."
659	
660	    else
661	      # ---- Unit 7: Full Ark — About and Vouch Pipeline ----
662	      buh_section "  The Full Ark: About and Vouch Pipeline"
663	      buh_e
664	      buh_t   "  Every hallmark — regardless of mode — produces the same three-part"
665	      buh_t   "  structure: image, about, and vouch. About contains the SBOM and"
666	      buh_t   "  build_info.json. Vouch contains the mode-specific verification."
667	      buh_e
668	      buh_tlt "  " "Plumb" "${z_docs}#Plumb" " lets you inspect an artifact's provenance — SBOM, build info,"
669	      buh_t   "  and vouch chain:"
670	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_PLUMB_FULL}"
671	      buh_e
672	      buh_t   "  Run plumb against each mode's hallmark and compare:"
673	      buh_tlt "    - " "Conjure" "${z_docs}#Conjure" " (sentry): DSSE vouch, SLSA provenance"
674	      buh_tlt "    - " "Bind" "${z_docs}#Bind" " (plantuml): digest-pin vouch, no provenance"
675	      buh_tlt "    - " "Graft" "${z_docs}#Graft" " (sentry): GRAFTED vouch, no provenance chain"
676	      buh_e
677	      buh_t   "  The tally command shows the full registry health view — the director's"
678	      buh_t   "  operational dashboard:"
679	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_TALLY_HALLMARKS}"
680	    fi
681	  fi
682	
683	  buh_e
684	  buh_tT "  Triage: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_TRIAGE}"
685	
686	}

688	rbho_governor() {
689	  buc_doc_brief "Governor walkthrough — manage service accounts and access"
690	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
691	
692	  local -r z_docs="${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}"
693	
694	  # --- Extract config and probe ---
695	  local z_secrets_dir=""
696	  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
697	    z_secrets_dir=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_SECRETS_DIR") || z_secrets_dir=""
698	  fi
699	
700	  local z_gu1 z_gu2 z_gu3
701	  zrbho_probe_governor_units
702	
703	  # --- Count progress ---
704	  local z_done=0
705	  if test "${z_gu1}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
706	  if test "${z_gu2}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
707	  if test "${z_gu3}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
708	  local -r z_total=3
709	
710	  # --- Header ---
711	  buh_section "Governor Walkthrough"
712	  buh_e
713	
714	  if test "${z_done}" = "${z_total}"; then
715	    # ============ REFERENCE MODE — all probes green ============
716	    buh_t  "  All steps complete. Re-run anytime to verify health."
717	    buh_e
718	    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Project access — governor credentials installed"
719	    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Service accounts — retriever and director SAs provisioned"
720	    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Verification — downstream roles can access the depot"
721	  else
722	    # ============ WALKTHROUGH MODE — show frontier unit ============
723	    local -r z_frontier=$((z_done + 1))
724	    buh_t  "  Step ${z_frontier} of ${z_total}"
725	    buh_e
726	
727	    if test "${z_gu1}" = "0"; then
728	      # ---- Unit 1: Project Access ----
729	      buh_section "  Project Access"
730	      buh_e
731	      buh_tlt "  A " "depot" "${z_docs}#Depot" " is the facility where container images are built and stored."
732	      buh_tlt "  A " "governor" "${z_docs}#Governor" " administers a depot — creating service accounts and"
733	      buh_t   "  managing access for those who build and run container images."
734	      buh_e
735	      buh_t   "  The governor works within a depot that the payor created. If no depot exists"
736	      buh_t   "  yet, that is a payor responsibility:"
737	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_PAYOR}"
738	      buh_e
739	      buh_t   "  To administer a depot, you need a governor service account key. Your payor"
740	      buh_t   "  creates one by running:"
741	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_MANTLE_GOVERNOR}"
742	      buh_e
743	      if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}"; then
744	        buh_t   "  Install the key file to:"
745	        buh_tc  "    " "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_governor}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"
746	      else
747	        buh_tW  "  " "Project not configured — .rbk/rbrr.env not found."
748	        buh_t   "  Run the payor walkthrough first, or ask your payor for the project files."
749	      fi
750	      buh_e
751	      buh_t   "  Once installed, re-run this walkthrough to continue."
752	
753	    elif test "${z_gu2}" = "0"; then
754	      # ---- Unit 2: Service Account Lifecycle ----
755	      buh_section "  Service Account Lifecycle"
756	      buh_e
757	      buh_t   "  The governor provisions access for two downstream roles:"
758	      buh_e
759	      buh_tlt "  A " "retriever" "${z_docs}#Retriever" " has read access to the depot — they pull and run"
760	      buh_t   "  container images that others have built."
761	      buh_tlt "  A " "director" "${z_docs}#Director" " has build and publish access — they create container"
762	      buh_t   "  images and push them to the registry."
763	      buh_e
764	      buh_tlt "  " "Charter" "${z_docs}#Charter" " creates a retriever service account with read access:"
765	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_CHARTER_RETRIEVER}"
766	      buh_e
767	      buh_tlt "  " "Knight" "${z_docs}#Knight" " creates a director service account with build access:"
768	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_KNIGHT_DIRECTOR}"
769	      buh_e
770	      buh_t   "  Each command creates the service account and applies the IAM grants it needs."
771	      buh_tlt "  The output is an RBRA key file — hand it to the retriever or director user. "  "Log" "${z_docs}#Log" ""
772	      buh_t   "  files capture the full provisioning details."
773	      buh_e
774	      buh_t   "  List issued service accounts:"
775	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_LIST_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}"
776	      buh_e
777	      buh_t   "  Install both credentials locally to advance this walkthrough."
778	      if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}"; then
779	        buh_tc  "    " "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_retriever}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"
780	        buh_tc  "    " "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_director}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"
781	      fi
782	
783	    else
784	      # ---- Unit 3: Verification ----
785	      buh_section "  Verification"
786	      buh_e
787	      buh_t   "  The service accounts you created include IAM grants — each SA gets exactly"
788	      buh_t   "  the permissions its role requires, no more. Retriever gets read access."
789	      buh_t   "  Director gets read, write, and build trigger access."
790	      buh_e
791	      buh_t   "  Verify the complete chain works by pulling an artifact with the retriever"
792	      buh_t   "  credentials. If the retriever can access the depot, your grants are correct."
793	      buh_e
794	      buh_t   "  Run the retriever walkthrough to summon a hallmark:"
795	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_RETRIEVER}"
796	      buh_e
797	      buh_t   "  This probe turns green when a GAR image from your depot exists locally —"
798	      buh_t   "  proving the retriever SA you chartered can actually access the registry."
799	    fi
800	  fi
801	
802	  buh_e
803	  buh_tT "  Triage: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_TRIAGE}"
804	
805	}
806	
807	rbho_payor() {
808	  buc_doc_brief "Payor walkthrough — GCP project, billing, and OAuth setup"
809	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
810	
811	  local -r z_docs="${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}"
812	
813	  # --- Extract config and probe ---
814	  local z_secrets_dir=""
815	  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
816	    z_secrets_dir=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_SECRETS_DIR") || z_secrets_dir=""
817	  fi
818	
819	  local z_pu1=0
820	  local z_pu2=0
821	  local z_pu3=0
822	  local z_pu4=0
823	  zrbho_probe_payor_units
824	
825	  # --- Count progress ---
826	  local z_done=0
827	  if test "${z_pu1}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
828	  if test "${z_pu2}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
829	  if test "${z_pu3}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
830	  if test "${z_pu4}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
831	  local -r z_total=4
832	
833	  # --- Header ---
834	  buh_section "Payor Walkthrough"
835	  buh_e
836	
837	  if test "${z_done}" = "${z_total}"; then
838	    # ============ REFERENCE MODE — all probes green ============
839	    buh_t  "  All steps complete. Re-run anytime to verify health."
840	    buh_e
841	    zrbho_po_status 1 "  OAuth bootstrap — credentials installed"
842	    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Project setup — GCP project configured"
843	    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Depot provisioning — infrastructure levied"
844	    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Governor handoff — governor SA created"
845	  else
846	    # ============ WALKTHROUGH MODE — show frontier unit ============
847	    local -r z_frontier=$((z_done + 1))
848	    buh_t  "  Step ${z_frontier} of ${z_total}"
849	    buh_e
850	
851	    if test "${z_pu1}" = "0"; then
852	      # ---- Unit 1: OAuth Bootstrap ----
853	      buh_section "  OAuth Bootstrap"
854	      buh_e
855	      buh_tlt "  The " "payor" "${z_docs}#Payor" " owns the GCP project and funds it. Unlike other roles"
856	      buh_t   "  that use service account keys, the payor authenticates via OAuth — representing"
857	      buh_t   "  the human project owner."
858	      buh_e
859	      buh_t   "  To get started, download an OAuth client secret JSON file from your GCP"
860	      buh_t   "  project's API credentials page, then run:"
861	      buh_tTc "    " "${RBZ_PAYOR_INSTALL}" " \${HOME}/Downloads/client_secret_*.json"
862	      buh_e
863	      buh_t   "  This walks you through the OAuth authorization flow and stores the credential"
864	      buh_t   "  securely. If you have an existing credential that has expired:"
865	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_PAYOR_REFRESH}"
866	      buh_e
867	      buh_t   "  Once installed, re-run this walkthrough to continue."
868	
869	    elif test "${z_pu2}" = "0"; then
870	      # ---- Unit 2: Project Setup ----
871	      buh_section "  Project Setup"
872	      buh_e
873	      buh_t   "  A funded GCP project is required before any infrastructure can be provisioned."
874	      buh_t   "  The project must have billing enabled and the OAuth consent screen configured."
875	      buh_e
876	      buh_t   "  Run the guided setup:"
877	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_PAYOR_ESTABLISH}"
878	      buh_e
879	      buh_t   "  This will guide you through project creation, billing enablement, and OAuth"
880	      buh_t   "  consent screen configuration. The project ID is recorded in regime files"
881	      buh_t   "  and becomes the identity for all depot operations."
882	      buh_e
883	      buh_t   "  Once complete, re-run this walkthrough to continue."
884	
885	    elif test "${z_pu3}" = "0"; then
886	      # ---- Unit 3: Depot Provisioning ----
887	      buh_section "  Depot Provisioning"
888	      buh_e
889	      buh_tlt "  A " "depot" "${z_docs}#Depot" " is the facility where container images are built and stored"
890	      buh_t   "  — a GCP project with a registry, storage bucket, and build infrastructure."
891	      buh_e
892	      buh_tlt "  To " "levy" "${z_docs}#Levy" " a depot is to provision this infrastructure. Run:"
893	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_LEVY_DEPOT}"
894	      buh_e
895	      buh_t   "  This enables APIs, creates the Artifact Registry repository and Cloud Storage"
896	      buh_tlt "  bucket, and configures Cloud Build. The " "Transcript" "${z_docs}#Transcript" " tracks each"
897	      buh_t   "  provisioning step. The depot is now ready for use."
898	      buh_e
899	      buh_t   "  List your depots to verify:"
900	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_LIST_DEPOT}"
901	      buh_e
902	      buh_t   "  Once provisioned, re-run this walkthrough to continue."
903	
904	    else
905	      # ---- Unit 4: Governor Handoff ----
906	      buh_section "  Governor Handoff"
907	      buh_e
908	      buh_tlt "  A " "governor" "${z_docs}#Governor" " administers a depot — creating service accounts and"
909	      buh_t   "  managing access for those who build and run container images."
910	      buh_e
911	      buh_t   "  The payor funds the infrastructure; the governor operates it. After this"
912	      buh_t   "  handoff, the governor can charter retrievers and knight directors"
913	      buh_t   "  independently. Run:"
914	      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_MANTLE_GOVERNOR}"
915	      buh_e
916	      buh_t   "  This creates the governor service account with administrative permissions"
917	      buh_t   "  over the depot. Hand the resulting key file to the person who will"
918	      buh_t   "  administer this depot."
919	      buh_e
920	      buh_t   "  The payor's job for this depot is done unless billing or project-level"
921	      buh_t   "  changes are needed."
922	    fi
923	  fi
924	
925	  buh_e
926	  buh_tT "  Triage: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_TRIAGE}"
927	
928	}

rbho_retriever() {
  buc_doc_brief "Retriever walkthrough — pull and run vessel images"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  local -r z_docs="${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}"

  # --- Extract config and probe ---
  local z_secrets_dir=""
  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
    z_secrets_dir=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_SECRETS_DIR") || z_secrets_dir=""
  fi

  local z_ru1 z_ru2 z_ru3 z_ru4
  zrbho_probe_retriever_units

  # --- Count progress ---
  local z_done=0
  if test "${z_ru1}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
  if test "${z_ru2}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
  if test "${z_ru3}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
  if test "${z_ru4}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
  local -r z_total=4

  # --- Header ---
  buh_section "Retriever Walkthrough"
  buh_e

  if test "${z_done}" = "${z_total}"; then
    # ============ REFERENCE MODE — all probes green ============
    buh_t  "  All steps complete. Re-run anytime to verify health."
    buh_e
    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Credential gate — SA key installed"
    zrbho_po_status 1 "  First artifact — hallmark summoned locally"
    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Container runtime — crucible charged"
    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Local experimentation — kludge image present"
  else
    # ============ WALKTHROUGH MODE — show frontier unit ============
    local -r z_frontier=$((z_done + 1))
    buh_t  "  Step ${z_frontier} of ${z_total}"
    buh_e

    if test "${z_ru1}" = "0"; then
      # ---- Unit 1: Credential Gate ----
      buh_section "  Credential Gate"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  A " "depot" "${z_docs}#Depot" " is the facility where container images are built and stored."
      buh_tlt "  A " "retriever" "${z_docs}#Retriever" " is a role with read access to a depot — you pull and run"
      buh_t   "  container images that others have built."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  To access a depot, you need a service account key. Your governor creates"
      buh_t   "  one by running:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_CHARTER_RETRIEVER}"
      buh_e
      if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}"; then
        buh_t   "  Install the key file to:"
        buh_tc  "    " "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_retriever}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"
      else
        buh_tW  "  " "Project not configured — .rbk/rbrr.env not found."
        buh_t   "  Run the payor walkthrough first, or ask your payor for the project files."
      fi
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Once installed, re-run this walkthrough to continue."

    elif test "${z_ru2}" = "0"; then
      # ---- Unit 2: First Artifact ----
      buh_section "  First Artifact"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  A " "vessel" "${z_docs}#Vessel" " is a specification for a container image."
      buh_tlt "  A " "hallmark" "${z_docs}#Hallmark" " is a specific build instance of a vessel, identified by"
      buh_t   "  timestamp."
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  " "Summon" "${z_docs}#Summon" " pulls a hallmark image from the depot to your local machine:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_SUMMON_HALLMARK}"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  If something fails, check the " "Log" "${z_docs}#Log" " — the file paths are printed at the"
      buh_t   "  top of the command output."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  After summoning, inspect the artifact's provenance:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_PLUMB_FULL}"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_PLUMB_COMPACT}"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  A " "vouch" "${z_docs}#Vouch" " is cryptographic attestation proving the artifact was built"
      buh_t   "  by trusted infrastructure."
      buh_tlt "  " "Plumb" "${z_docs}#Plumb" " lets you inspect the SBOM, build info, and vouch chain —"
      buh_t   "  this is how you know what you're running."

    elif test "${z_ru3}" = "0"; then
      # ---- Unit 3: Container Runtime ----
      buh_section "  Container Runtime"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  A " "bottle" "${z_docs}#Bottle" " is your workload container, running unmodified in a controlled"
      buh_t   "  network environment."
      buh_tlt "  A " "nameplate" "${z_docs}#Nameplate" " ties a sentry and bottle together into a runnable unit."
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  The " "sentry" "${z_docs}#Sentry" " enforces network policies via iptables and dnsmasq."
      buh_tlt "  The " "pentacle" "${z_docs}#Pentacle" " establishes the network namespace shared with the bottle."
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  " "Charge" "${z_docs}#Charge" " starts the sentry/pentacle/bottle triad:"
      buh_tI  "    " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_CHARGE}" "${RBCC_onboarding_nameplate}"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Shell into the bottle and look around:"
      buh_tTc "    " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_RACK}" " ${RBCC_onboarding_nameplate}"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  When done, " "quench" "${z_docs}#Quench" " stops and cleans up:"
      buh_tI  "    " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_QUENCH}" "${RBCC_onboarding_nameplate}"

    else
      # ---- Unit 4: Local Experimentation ----
      buh_section "  Local Experimentation"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  " "Kludge" "${z_docs}#Kludge" " builds a vessel image locally for fast iteration — no registry"
      buh_t   "  push, no director credentials needed:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_KLUDGE_VESSEL}"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  After kludging, charge a nameplate to test your local build, then rack in"
      buh_t   "  and look around. Kludge is the retriever's experimentation tool — iterate"
      buh_t   "  on your local environment without Cloud Build."
    fi
  fi

  buh_e
  buh_tT "  Triage: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_TRIAGE}"

}

rbho_director() {
  buc_doc_brief "Director walkthrough — build and publish vessel images"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  local -r z_docs="${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}"

  # --- Extract config and probe ---
  local z_secrets_dir=""
  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
    z_secrets_dir=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_SECRETS_DIR") || z_secrets_dir=""
  fi

  local z_du1=0
  local z_du2=0
  local z_du3=0
  local z_du4=0
  local z_du5=0
  local z_du6=0
  local z_du7=0
  zrbho_probe_director_units

  # --- Count progress ---
  local z_done=0
  if test "${z_du1}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
  if test "${z_du2}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
  if test "${z_du3}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
  if test "${z_du4}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
  if test "${z_du5}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
  if test "${z_du6}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
  if test "${z_du7}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
  local -r z_total=7

  # --- Header ---
  buh_section "Director Walkthrough"
  buh_e

  if test "${z_done}" = "${z_total}"; then
    # ============ REFERENCE MODE — all probes green ============
    buh_t  "  All steps complete. Re-run anytime to verify health."
    buh_e
    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Credential gate — director SA key installed"
    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Local build — kludge image present"
    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Depot foundation — base images enshrined"
    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Conjure — production build image present"
    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Bind — pinned upstream image present"
    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Graft — locally-built image pushed"
    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Full ark — all three modes compared"
  else
    # ============ WALKTHROUGH MODE — show frontier unit ============
    local -r z_frontier=$((z_done + 1))
    buh_t  "  Step ${z_frontier} of ${z_total}"
    buh_e

    if test "${z_du1}" = "0"; then
      # ---- Unit 1: Credential Gate ----
      buh_section "  Credential Gate"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  A " "depot" "${z_docs}#Depot" " is the facility where container images are built and stored."
      buh_tlt "  A " "director" "${z_docs}#Director" " is a role with build and publish access to a depot —"
      buh_t   "  you create container images and push them to the registry."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Where a retriever can only pull, a director can build, push, and manage"
      buh_t   "  artifacts. Your governor knighted this service account for build operations."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  To access a depot, you need a service account key. Your governor creates"
      buh_t   "  one by running:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_KNIGHT_DIRECTOR}"
      buh_e
      if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}"; then
        buh_t   "  Install the key file to:"
        buh_tc  "    " "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_director}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"
      else
        buh_tW  "  " "Project not configured — .rbk/rbrr.env not found."
        buh_t   "  Run the payor walkthrough first, or ask your payor for the project files."
      fi
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Once installed, re-run this walkthrough to continue."

    elif test "${z_du2}" = "0"; then
      # ---- Unit 2: Kludge — Local Build ----
      buh_section "  Kludge: Local Build"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  A " "vessel" "${z_docs}#Vessel" " is a specification for a container image — a Dockerfile,"
      buh_t   "  build context, and metadata defining what gets built."
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  " "Kludge" "${z_docs}#Kludge" " builds a vessel image locally using Docker — no Cloud Build"
      buh_t   "  setup needed, no registry push. The fastest way to see a vessel come to life."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Build the sentry vessel locally:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_KLUDGE_VESSEL}"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  After kludging, test by " "charging" "${z_docs}#Charge" " a crucible and shelling in:"
      buh_tI  "    " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_CHARGE}" "${RBCC_onboarding_nameplate}"
      buh_tTc "    " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_RACK}" " ${RBCC_onboarding_nameplate}"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Later units teach how to build this same vessel via Cloud Build for production,"
      buh_t   "  and how to push your local build to the registry."

    elif test "${z_du3}" = "0"; then
      # ---- Unit 3: Depot Foundation — Reliquary and Enshrine ----
      buh_section "  Depot Foundation: Reliquary and Enshrine"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Before Cloud Build can create production images, the depot needs two kinds"
      buh_t   "  of upstream images mirrored into your registry:"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  An " "ark" "${z_docs}#Ark" " is an immutable container image artifact in the registry,"
      buh_t   "  produced from a vessel."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Tool images (reliquary): gcloud, docker, syft, skopeo, binfmt — the"
      buh_t   "  tools that Cloud Build steps consume during a build."
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  Base images (" "enshrine" "${z_docs}#Enshrine" "): the upstream images that vessels build FROM."
      buh_t   "  Mirrored into your depot's registry with content-addressed anchors."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Mirror tool images into the depot:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_INSCRIBE_RELIQUARY}"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Enshrine base images for the sentry vessel:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_ENSHRINE_VESSEL}"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  Both are multi-step orchestrations. The " "Transcript" "${z_docs}#Transcript" " captures each"
      buh_tlt "  decision point; the " "Log" "${z_docs}#Log" " captures full output. Check them if a step fails."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Reliquary provides the tools; enshrine provides the foundations."
      buh_tltlt "  Both must be in place before " "conjure" "${z_docs}#Conjure" " or " "bind" "${z_docs}#Bind" "."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  After completing both, proceed to conjure your first production build."
      buh_tlt "  The probe for this step turns green when a conjure " "hallmark" "${z_docs}#Hallmark" ""
      buh_tlt "  is " "summoned" "${z_docs}#Summon" " locally (next step)."

    elif test "${z_du4}" = "0"; then
      # ---- Unit 4: Conjure — Production Build ----
      # (Frontier only if du3 green but du4 red — rare due to shared probe,
      #  but shown in reference mode as separate unit)
      buh_section "  Conjure: Production Build"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  A " "hallmark" "${z_docs}#Hallmark" " is a specific build instance of a vessel, identified by"
      buh_t   "  timestamp."
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  " "Ordain" "${z_docs}#Ordain" " creates a hallmark with full attestation — the production build"
      buh_t   "  command."
      buh_tlt "  " "Conjure" "${z_docs}#Conjure" " is the ordain mode where Cloud Build creates the image from"
      buh_t   "  source. Every conjure produces a three-part ark: image, about (SBOM + build"
      buh_t   "  info), and vouch (DSSE signature verification)."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  This is the same vessel you kludged locally — now Cloud Build creates it"
      buh_tlt "  with full SLSA provenance. The " "Transcript" "${z_docs}#Transcript" " tracks build submission,"
      buh_t   "  polling, and attestation steps:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK}"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  Verify with " "vouch" "${z_docs}#Vouch" " (cryptographic attestation) and"
      buh_tlt "  " "tally" "${z_docs}#Tally" " (registry inventory):"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_VOUCH_HALLMARKS}"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_TALLY_HALLMARKS}"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  Then " "summon" "${z_docs}#Summon" " the hallmark locally to confirm the full pipeline:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_SUMMON_HALLMARK}"

    elif test "${z_du5}" = "0"; then
      # ---- Unit 5: Bind — Pin Upstream Image ----
      buh_section "  Bind: Pin Upstream Image"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  " "Bind" "${z_docs}#Bind" " mirrors a pinned upstream image into your depot. No Dockerfile,"
      buh_t   "  no build — just a content-addressed copy."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  PlantUML is useful for rendering architecture diagrams, but its Docker Hub"
      buh_tlt "  image could send your private diagrams anywhere. Bind pins it by " "digest" "${z_docs}#Bind" " —"
      buh_tlt "  no silent updates. Then " "charge" "${z_docs}#Charge" " it as a bottle: the sentry blocks"
      buh_t   "  all egress. You get the tool without the risk."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Ordain the plantuml vessel in bind mode:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK}"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  The upstream image is pulled by digest, pushed to GAR, about metadata"
      buh_tlt "  generated, and " "vouch" "${z_docs}#Vouch" " records a digest-pin verdict. No SLSA provenance —"
      buh_t   "  the image was not built here, but it is pinned and bottled."
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  Verify and " "summon" "${z_docs}#Summon" ":"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_VOUCH_HALLMARKS}"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_SUMMON_HALLMARK}"

    elif test "${z_du6}" = "0"; then
      # ---- Unit 6: Graft — Push Local to Registry ----
      buh_section "  Graft: Push Local to Registry"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  " "Graft" "${z_docs}#Graft" " pushes a locally-built image to GAR. The image push is local"
      buh_t   "  (docker push), but about and vouch still run in Cloud Build."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  You kludged the sentry in step 2 and conjured it in step 4. Now push your"
      buh_t   "  local build to the registry via graft:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK}"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  One combined Cloud Build job runs about + vouch. The vouch verdict is"
      buh_t   "  GRAFTED — meaning this image was locally built, trust it at your own"
      buh_t   "  assessment."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  The development cycle: kludge, test, graft when satisfied."

    else
      # ---- Unit 7: Full Ark — About and Vouch Pipeline ----
      buh_section "  The Full Ark: About and Vouch Pipeline"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Every hallmark — regardless of mode — produces the same three-part"
      buh_t   "  structure: image, about, and vouch. About contains the SBOM and"
      buh_t   "  build_info.json. Vouch contains the mode-specific verification."
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  " "Plumb" "${z_docs}#Plumb" " lets you inspect an artifact's provenance — SBOM, build info,"
      buh_t   "  and vouch chain:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_PLUMB_FULL}"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Run plumb against each mode's hallmark and compare:"
      buh_tlt "    - " "Conjure" "${z_docs}#Conjure" " (sentry): DSSE vouch, SLSA provenance"
      buh_tlt "    - " "Bind" "${z_docs}#Bind" " (plantuml): digest-pin vouch, no provenance"
      buh_tlt "    - " "Graft" "${z_docs}#Graft" " (sentry): GRAFTED vouch, no provenance chain"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  The tally command shows the full registry health view — the director's"
      buh_t   "  operational dashboard:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_TALLY_HALLMARKS}"
    fi
  fi

  buh_e
  buh_tT "  Triage: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_TRIAGE}"

}

rbho_governor() {
  buc_doc_brief "Governor walkthrough — manage service accounts and access"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  local -r z_docs="${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}"

  # --- Extract config and probe ---
  local z_secrets_dir=""
  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
    z_secrets_dir=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_SECRETS_DIR") || z_secrets_dir=""
  fi

  local z_gu1 z_gu2 z_gu3
  zrbho_probe_governor_units

  # --- Count progress ---
  local z_done=0
  if test "${z_gu1}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
  if test "${z_gu2}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
  if test "${z_gu3}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
  local -r z_total=3

  # --- Header ---
  buh_section "Governor Walkthrough"
  buh_e

  if test "${z_done}" = "${z_total}"; then
    # ============ REFERENCE MODE — all probes green ============
    buh_t  "  All steps complete. Re-run anytime to verify health."
    buh_e
    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Project access — governor credentials installed"
    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Service accounts — retriever and director SAs provisioned"
    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Verification — downstream roles can access the depot"
  else
    # ============ WALKTHROUGH MODE — show frontier unit ============
    local -r z_frontier=$((z_done + 1))
    buh_t  "  Step ${z_frontier} of ${z_total}"
    buh_e

    if test "${z_gu1}" = "0"; then
      # ---- Unit 1: Project Access ----
      buh_section "  Project Access"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  A " "depot" "${z_docs}#Depot" " is the facility where container images are built and stored."
      buh_tlt "  A " "governor" "${z_docs}#Governor" " administers a depot — creating service accounts and"
      buh_t   "  managing access for those who build and run container images."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  The governor works within a depot that the payor created. If no depot exists"
      buh_t   "  yet, that is a payor responsibility:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_PAYOR}"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  To administer a depot, you need a governor service account key. Your payor"
      buh_t   "  creates one by running:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_MANTLE_GOVERNOR}"
      buh_e
      if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}"; then
        buh_t   "  Install the key file to:"
        buh_tc  "    " "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_governor}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"
      else
        buh_tW  "  " "Project not configured — .rbk/rbrr.env not found."
        buh_t   "  Run the payor walkthrough first, or ask your payor for the project files."
      fi
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Once installed, re-run this walkthrough to continue."

    elif test "${z_gu2}" = "0"; then
      # ---- Unit 2: Service Account Lifecycle ----
      buh_section "  Service Account Lifecycle"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  The governor provisions access for two downstream roles:"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  A " "retriever" "${z_docs}#Retriever" " has read access to the depot — they pull and run"
      buh_t   "  container images that others have built."
      buh_tlt "  A " "director" "${z_docs}#Director" " has build and publish access — they create container"
      buh_t   "  images and push them to the registry."
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  " "Charter" "${z_docs}#Charter" " creates a retriever service account with read access:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_CHARTER_RETRIEVER}"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  " "Knight" "${z_docs}#Knight" " creates a director service account with build access:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_KNIGHT_DIRECTOR}"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Each command creates the service account and applies the IAM grants it needs."
      buh_tlt "  The output is an RBRA key file — hand it to the retriever or director user. "  "Log" "${z_docs}#Log" ""
      buh_t   "  files capture the full provisioning details."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  List issued service accounts:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_LIST_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Install both credentials locally to advance this walkthrough."
      if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}"; then
        buh_tc  "    " "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_retriever}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"
        buh_tc  "    " "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_director}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"
      fi

    else
      # ---- Unit 3: Verification ----
      buh_section "  Verification"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  The service accounts you created include IAM grants — each SA gets exactly"
      buh_t   "  the permissions its role requires, no more. Retriever gets read access."
      buh_t   "  Director gets read, write, and build trigger access."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Verify the complete chain works by pulling an artifact with the retriever"
      buh_t   "  credentials. If the retriever can access the depot, your grants are correct."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Run the retriever walkthrough to summon a hallmark:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_RETRIEVER}"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  This probe turns green when a GAR image from your depot exists locally —"
      buh_t   "  proving the retriever SA you chartered can actually access the registry."
    fi
  fi

  buh_e
  buh_tT "  Triage: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_TRIAGE}"

}

rbho_payor() {
  buc_doc_brief "Payor walkthrough — GCP project, billing, and OAuth setup"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  local -r z_docs="${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}"

  # --- Extract config and probe ---
  local z_secrets_dir=""
  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
    z_secrets_dir=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_SECRETS_DIR") || z_secrets_dir=""
  fi

  local z_pu1=0
  local z_pu2=0
  local z_pu3=0
  local z_pu4=0
  zrbho_probe_payor_units

  # --- Count progress ---
  local z_done=0
  if test "${z_pu1}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
  if test "${z_pu2}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
  if test "${z_pu3}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
  if test "${z_pu4}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
  local -r z_total=4

  # --- Header ---
  buh_section "Payor Walkthrough"
  buh_e

  if test "${z_done}" = "${z_total}"; then
    # ============ REFERENCE MODE — all probes green ============
    buh_t  "  All steps complete. Re-run anytime to verify health."
    buh_e
    zrbho_po_status 1 "  OAuth bootstrap — credentials installed"
    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Project setup — GCP project configured"
    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Depot provisioning — infrastructure levied"
    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Governor handoff — governor SA created"
  else
    # ============ WALKTHROUGH MODE — show frontier unit ============
    local -r z_frontier=$((z_done + 1))
    buh_t  "  Step ${z_frontier} of ${z_total}"
    buh_e

    if test "${z_pu1}" = "0"; then
      # ---- Unit 1: OAuth Bootstrap ----
      buh_section "  OAuth Bootstrap"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  The " "payor" "${z_docs}#Payor" " owns the GCP project and funds it. Unlike other roles"
      buh_t   "  that use service account keys, the payor authenticates via OAuth — representing"
      buh_t   "  the human project owner."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  To get started, download an OAuth client secret JSON file from your GCP"
      buh_t   "  project's API credentials page, then run:"
      buh_tTc "    " "${RBZ_PAYOR_INSTALL}" " \${HOME}/Downloads/client_secret_*.json"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  This walks you through the OAuth authorization flow and stores the credential"
      buh_t   "  securely. If you have an existing credential that has expired:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_PAYOR_REFRESH}"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Once installed, re-run this walkthrough to continue."

    elif test "${z_pu2}" = "0"; then
      # ---- Unit 2: Project Setup ----
      buh_section "  Project Setup"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  A funded GCP project is required before any infrastructure can be provisioned."
      buh_t   "  The project must have billing enabled and the OAuth consent screen configured."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Run the guided setup:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_PAYOR_ESTABLISH}"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  This will guide you through project creation, billing enablement, and OAuth"
      buh_t   "  consent screen configuration. The project ID is recorded in regime files"
      buh_t   "  and becomes the identity for all depot operations."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Once complete, re-run this walkthrough to continue."

    elif test "${z_pu3}" = "0"; then
      # ---- Unit 3: Depot Provisioning ----
      buh_section "  Depot Provisioning"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  A " "depot" "${z_docs}#Depot" " is the facility where container images are built and stored"
      buh_t   "  — a GCP project with a registry, storage bucket, and build infrastructure."
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  To " "levy" "${z_docs}#Levy" " a depot is to provision this infrastructure. Run:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_LEVY_DEPOT}"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  This enables APIs, creates the Artifact Registry repository and Cloud Storage"
      buh_tlt "  bucket, and configures Cloud Build. The " "Transcript" "${z_docs}#Transcript" " tracks each"
      buh_t   "  provisioning step. The depot is now ready for use."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  List your depots to verify:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_LIST_DEPOT}"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Once provisioned, re-run this walkthrough to continue."

    else
      # ---- Unit 4: Governor Handoff ----
      buh_section "  Governor Handoff"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  A " "governor" "${z_docs}#Governor" " administers a depot — creating service accounts and"
      buh_t   "  managing access for those who build and run container images."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  The payor funds the infrastructure; the governor operates it. After this"
      buh_t   "  handoff, the governor can charter retrievers and knight directors"
      buh_t   "  independently. Run:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_MANTLE_GOVERNOR}"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  This creates the governor service account with administrative permissions"
      buh_t   "  over the depot. Hand the resulting key file to the person who will"
      buh_t   "  administer this depot."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  The payor's job for this depot is done unless billing or project-level"
      buh_t   "  changes are needed."
    fi
  fi

  buh_e
  buh_tT "  Triage: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_TRIAGE}"

}

rbho_retriever() {

  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  local z_secrets_dir=""
  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then

  if test "${z_ru2}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
  if test "${z_ru3}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
  if test "${z_ru4}" = "1"; then z_done=$((z_done + 1)); fi
  local -r z_total=4

  # --- Header ---
  buh_section "Retriever Walkthrough"
  buh_e

  if test "${z_done}" = "${z_total}"; then
    # ============ REFERENCE MODE — all probes green ============
    buh_t  "  All steps complete. Re-run anytime to verify health."
    buh_e
    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Credential gate — SA key installed"
    zrbho_po_status 1 "  First artifact — hallmark summoned locally"
    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Container runtime — crucible charged"
    zrbho_po_status 1 "  Local experimentation — kludge image present"
  else
    # ============ WALKTHROUGH MODE — show frontier unit ============
    local -r z_frontier=$((z_done + 1))
    buh_t  "  Step ${z_frontier} of ${z_total}"
    buh_e

    if test "${z_ru1}" = "0"; then
      # ---- Unit 1: Credential Gate ----
      buh_section "  Credential Gate"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  A " "depot" "${z_docs}#Depot" " is the facility where container images are built and stored."
      buh_tlt "  A " "retriever" "${z_docs}#Retriever" " is a role with read access to a depot — you pull and run"
      buh_t   "  container images that others have built."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  To access a depot, you need a service account key. Your governor creates"
      buh_t   "  one by running:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_CHARTER_RETRIEVER}"
      buh_e
      if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}"; then
        buh_t   "  Install the key file to:"
        buh_tc  "    " "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_retriever}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"
      else
        buh_tW  "  " "Project not configured — .rbk/rbrr.env not found."
        buh_t   "  Run the payor walkthrough first, or ask your payor for the project files."
      fi
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Once installed, re-run this walkthrough to continue."

    elif test "${z_ru2}" = "0"; then
      # ---- Unit 2: First Artifact ----
      buh_section "  First Artifact"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  A " "vessel" "${z_docs}#Vessel" " is a specification for a container image."
      buh_tlt "  A " "hallmark" "${z_docs}#Hallmark" " is a specific build instance of a vessel, identified by"
      buh_t   "  timestamp."
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  " "Summon" "${z_docs}#Summon" " pulls a hallmark image from the depot to your local machine:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_SUMMON_HALLMARK}"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  If something fails, check the " "Log" "${z_docs}#Log" " — the file paths are printed at the"
      buh_t   "  top of the command output."
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  After summoning, inspect the artifact's provenance:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_PLUMB_FULL}"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_PLUMB_COMPACT}"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  A " "vouch" "${z_docs}#Vouch" " is cryptographic attestation proving the artifact was built"
      buh_t   "  by trusted infrastructure."
      buh_tlt "  " "Plumb" "${z_docs}#Plumb" " lets you inspect the SBOM, build info, and vouch chain —"
      buh_t   "  this is how you know what you're running."

    elif test "${z_ru3}" = "0"; then
      # ---- Unit 3: Container Runtime ----
      buh_section "  Container Runtime"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  A " "bottle" "${z_docs}#Bottle" " is your workload container, running unmodified in a controlled"
      buh_t   "  network environment."
      buh_tlt "  A " "nameplate" "${z_docs}#Nameplate" " ties a sentry and bottle together into a runnable unit."
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  The " "sentry" "${z_docs}#Sentry" " enforces network policies via iptables and dnsmasq."
      buh_tlt "  The " "pentacle" "${z_docs}#Pentacle" " establishes the network namespace shared with the bottle."
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  " "Charge" "${z_docs}#Charge" " starts the sentry/pentacle/bottle triad:"
      buh_tI  "    " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_CHARGE}" "${RBCC_onboarding_nameplate}"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  Shell into the bottle and look around:"
      buh_tTc "    " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_RACK}" " ${RBCC_onboarding_nameplate}"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  When done, " "quench" "${z_docs}#Quench" " stops and cleans up:"
      buh_tI  "    " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_QUENCH}" "${RBCC_onboarding_nameplate}"

    else
      # ---- Unit 4: Local Experimentation ----
      buh_section "  Local Experimentation"
      buh_e
      buh_tlt "  " "Kludge" "${z_docs}#Kludge" " builds a vessel image locally for fast iteration — no registry"
      buh_t   "  push, no director credentials needed:"
      buh_tT  "    " "${RBZ_KLUDGE_VESSEL}"
      buh_e
      buh_t   "  After kludging, charge a nameplate to test your local build, then rack in"
      buh_t   "  and look around. Kludge is the retriever's experimentation tool — iterate"
      buh_t   "  on your local environment without Cloud Build."
    fi
  fi

  buh_e
  buh_tT "  Triage: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_TRIAGE}"

}
